observation: A blue highway exit sign in the background was incorrectly labelled as a licence plate in the ground truth  while the Tesla Model X's real plate was detected correctly.
Plate detected accurately despite a low  angled view of the convertible in busy multi-lane traffic.
Plate still detected correctly despite heavy motion-blur and colour distortion in the underground parking garage photo.
A second plate on the rear bumper was not detected at all even though the vehicle's main plate was picked up correctly.
Real plate present and clearly visible at night but the model failed to detect it.
Rear plate detected correctly at night despite glare from the tail lights.
Plate detected accurately on the SUV despite low-light nighttime conditions.
Clear front-facing plate on the sedan detected accurately with a tight bounding box.
